b
v
 g d h
o
u
 z x T
i
j
 k K l m M

נ ן ס ע פ ף צ ץ ק ר ש ת ־ ׳ ״ ﬩
n N s y
f
p
F
P
 c C q r w t e-
G
e'
GG
e"
 e+

◌ְ ◌ֵ ◌ֶ ◌ֱ ◌ַ ◌ָ ◌ֲ ◌ֳ ◌ִ ◌ֹ וֺ ◌ֻ ◌ּ שׁ שׂ
E EE EEE EEEE A AA AE AAE I O
oeo
ueo
 U D W S
❗️Use O to add holam to all letters. To use holam haser with ו type oeo or ueo. This produces וֺ, as opposed to normal וֹ.
